name: Agnieszka Hayashida
content: Go2Rinjani made our 2D1N trek unforgettable! The guides were professional and very helpful.

name: Aidan Aguirre
content: Go2Rinjani is simply the easiest tour agency to work with for a 3-day 2-night trip. I instantly fell in love with their excellent service, great food, and the incredible porters who went above and beyond for our group.

name: Alexandra Giraldo
content: I led a group of friends using different local tours before, but our 4D3N with Go2Rinjani was the best. We're just using Go2Rinjani from now on to do it all.

name: Aline Louzada
content: Go2Rinjani is very easy to book with, and the team is incredibly friendly and intuitive. Provided us a good quality tent during the 2-day trek, and also good insights from our local guide.

name: Amar Balic
content: Our 3D2N trek was our primary vacation and Go2Rinjani provided us around 60% better equipment than we expected for the climb!

name: Amir
content: Go2Rinjani replaces the hassle of booking everything yourself while being faster and easier to use for planning a 4D3N trek.

name: Andrea
content: I used other agencies in the past. But Go2Rinjani does it all for our 2-day 1-night trip! Fantastic stuff and keep up the good work on Mount Rinjani!

name: Atanas Baev
content: The agency feels like having an extra team member who never sleeps. I especially love the seamless booking and real-time updates from Go2Rinjani, which have significantly boosted our 3D2N Rinjani trip success.

name: Augusto Barzante
content: Planning a 4D3N has never been easier with a tour agency like Go2Rinjani. In 10 minutes, you can book a highly-personalized trip and start packing. The porters and guides are truly amazing throughout the ascent.

name: Ivana Cattafi
content: Fantastic volcano trek. Rodi was a great guide and the porters made delicious food. My boyfriend proposed on the mountain, making it especially unforgettable. Be ready for cold near the summit and bring warm gloves. Highly recommend this tour.

name: Bianca Botez
content: It was a wonderful experience; the company organized everything excellently, and the service was comprehensive. We found the team to be excellent, friendly, and helpful. We highly recommend it!

name: Carolina Marco
content: I absolutely love everything about Go2Rinjani! Their perfect 4D3N package, along with features like high-quality tents, delicious warm meals, and detailed trip guidance, make it a comprehensive choice for anyone climbing Mt Rinjani.

name: Chad Browne
content: Amazing 2D1N trek and effective guides. They really thought about many ways to help us. Customer support is amazing as well!

name: Christian Persico
content: Go2Rinjani: a silent mountain superhero! Their ability to guide our 3D2N trip is impressive, saving us countless hours of planning while keeping our morale high. The food recommendations? Absolute chef’s kiss!

name: Xavier Viñas Baqué
content: Super professional rinjani trek agents. I recommend 100%

name: Dan Rhondeau
content: Go2Rinjani has helped us experience views we wouldn't have otherwise found, on a 2-day 1-night trip. Love the trek and the team for it!

name: Emilien Cheveux
content: I like that you don't have to hire multiple agencies: Go2Rinjani handles everything for your 3D2N trip on Mount Rinjani.

name: Eoin Beecham
content: Intuitive booking. Easy to organize a 4D3N trek and the guides flag relevant safety tips on the trail. Replaces all the hassle and centralises the adventure in one cool plan.

name: Erica Templeton
content: Go2Rinjani allows us to trek as though we have a massive support team, even if it's just a couple of friends on a 2D1N reaching the top.

name: Evan West
content: Since booking our 3D2N with Go2Rinjani, I have found that they have the trekkers in mind and cover your safety from all possible angles.

name: Frederic Dufour
content: The service and support offered by Go2Rinjani is perfect, and if you book the 4D3N trip the right way, it's a perfect adventure for your friend group.

name: Gerry Hadzhigeorgieva
content: The porters are a game changer. We started seeing their dedication from the first few hours of our 2D1N trek. I love that it has all meals included so I don't need to juggle cooking to enjoy the views.

name: Hana
content: It has all of the incredible features of other mountain tours I have seen, but it also includes luxury layers and options for a 3D2N trek with warm food on the mountaintop that I haven't seen before. Groundbreaking trip!

name: Jackson Williams
content: My workflow before Go2Rinjani was standard: find a guide > figure out gear > bring food. With Go2Rinjani's 4D3N package, all I had to do was show up at the base and they did the rest for me. Best Mount Rinjani experience ever, hands down absolutely recommend them!

name: Jaifar Ben Othman
content: Go2Rinjani has helped us streamline our 2D1N trip by handling the logistics. But what really stands out is how they focus on quality safety measures over just rushing to the summit.

name: João Daniel Wosch Miranda
content: What stands out the most is the ability to enjoy highly personalized 3D2N treks with great guides. It also provides useful safety tips and amazing camping features to improve our overall hiking performance on Rinjani.

name: John
content: We reached the summit in one day with a fantastic 4D3N itinerary we booked using Go2Rinjani!!

name: José Marques
content: Before using Go2Rinjani, I was heavily reliant on DIY planning for my Mount Rinjani climb. Go2Rinjani is an incredible upgrade, their 2D1N package is highly recommended, the porters are faster, and the guide truly enhances how we reach the summit with the right pace. It’s like having a smart local assistant built into our entire outdoor strategy.

name: Karén Mkhitaryan
content: Go2Rinjani's 3D2N package gives access to a wide range of beautiful trails, and the guide's knowledge is surprisingly advanced, a game-changer for personalized trekking. I also love their versatile camping setup, which allows for complex but relaxing rests on the Mount Rinjani.

name: Kevin Lin
content: Took about 1 day of trekking to realize Go2Rinjani is the best for a 4D3N. I have liked what I've seen so far of the mountain views; and the integration with the local porters has been so great.

name: Lauren Conner
content: Go2Rinjani is like 4 tour guides in 1! It's easy to book and allows you to enjoy Mount Rinjani at the right pace. I am able to hike through difficult terrain during our 2D1N trip and do it in a way I know is safe every time thanks to their service.

name: Lewis Bell
content: Gives me new energy points for a 3D2N trip with people who've been wanting to see the crater or have had changes in their schedule which might indicate it's a good time to reach the summit and add an exciting hike to their Indonesian travel cycle.

name: Lucas
content: Go2Rinjani’s team takes a ton of the heavy lifting out of navigating... smart trail recommendations, amazing food, and incredible 4D3N optimization all feel a massive step ahead of most mountain guides I’ve ever used.

name: Lucas Summers
content: I went from a stressful planning to an amazing relaxing trek with Go2Rinjani on our 2D1N. The safety rate is very high compared to other guides I have used and should also mention that the provided mountain gear is excellent.

name: Luke Sheehy
content: During the 3D2N trek alone, we enjoyed 5-6 amazing meals - all cooked by porters, not our own guesswork on food.

name: Mari-Liis Põldar
content: Go2Rinjani really seems to be the gamechanger in 4D3N treks. I love the scenic views and of course - our awesome guide!

name: Mateo
content: Their team functionality is genuinely useful, generating a targeted and well-paced 2-day 1-night trek that actually works. One key feature that is very useful is that the pace of the hike can be heavily controlled and is easily adjusted and refined so you never feel rushed climbing Mount Rinjani.

name: Monique Brandao
content: Go2Rinjani has completely transformed the way we climb Mount Rinjani! The level of personalization during our 3D2N trip is unmatched, making the summit push more epic than ever.

name: Paul Byrne
content: For me to plan a trek typically takes weeks of research from gear to routes. On average, Go2Rinjani helped me organize and enjoy an incredible 4D3N Rinjani trip with amazing guides and porters in less than 20 minutes!

name: Pedro Guerreiro
content: I really like Go2Rinjani for its ease of booking our 2D1N engagement on Mount Rinjani! It saves a lot of time with permit requests and gives us amazing pre-trip preparation.

name: Yosafat Zevo
content: Recently booked the “Sembalun Hot Spring Reward 3 Days 2 Nights” package with Go2Rinjani, and it was truly an unforgettable experience! From the very beginning, their team was professional, friendly, and well-organized.

name: PJ Smith
content: Big fan of Go2Rinjani!! Used other hiking agencies in the past and Go2Rinjani's 4D3N trip blew them all away!

name: Priya
content: In my experience, at least in Lombok, they always had the best 2D1N itinerary for trekking. We checked a ton of agencies in the region, but Go2Rinjani was always the most reliable for guides and porters to conquer the Mount Rinjani.

name: Roxy Lapusneanu
content: As a hiker, it makes my 3D2N Rinjani process infinitely easier, especially in the first days of acclimatizing. The guide correctly understands my stamina and handles the pacing perfectly to ensure we successfully reach the top safely.

name: Thomas Wood
content: We tested many different agencies for our 4D3N trek and turned back to Go2Rinjani for the best experience!

name: Tim Hartnett
content: Really strong gear quality & guides for when you should reach the summit & when to rest (hike smarter, not harder). This helps to cut through the exhausting parts of the 2D1N Rinjani adventure.

name: Youssef Lachnani
content: Go2Rinjani is really easy to book and gives you all the necessary gear for a 3-day 2-night trekking campaign. It is really easy to follow their guidance and the porters are always incredibly helpful on the trail.

name: Zoe
content: My group has been relying on Go2Rinjani for our 4D3N trek, and we're totally happy with the experience after transitioning from solo hiking. Go2Rinjani is developing pretty fast and providing more and more great memories.
